description_long: This is a white football featuring dynamic blue curved graphics and multiple visible logos, including the Chelsea FC crest and the Adidas brand. The surface shows signs of use, with visible scuff marks and some dirt, indicating it has been played with outdoors. The ball is constructed from several synthetic panels, joined together with visible stitching, forming a modern, non-traditional panel pattern. The Chelsea FC branding is prominent, with the club's name and crest appearing on multiple panels, and the Adidas logo is also present. The ball's surface is slightly glossy, with a semi-soft tactile feel typical of synthetic leather footballs. The overall shape is spherical, and the ball appears to be fully inflated, maintaining its roundness and structural integrity.
description: A white and blue Chelsea FC football with Adidas branding, visible scuff marks, and a modern stitched panel design. The ball shows signs of outdoor use and features a slightly glossy, synthetic surface.
description_view_0: This view highlights the Chelsea FC text and blue curved graphics, with visible scuff marks and dirt on the white panels.
description_view_1: This angle shows the Chelsea FC crest, Adidas logo, and more pronounced blue graphics, along with additional surface wear.
description_view_2: This side displays mostly the blue graphic pattern with minimal branding visible, focusing on the panel seams and some dirt marks.
description_view_3: This view features the Chelsea FC crest, a trophy emblem, and blue graphics, with moderate scuffing and clear panel stitching.
